title: Layer
content:
Layer
Status
Description
UID Constitution
✅ Locked
Canonical structure governs all naming and logic
L1 Knowledge Vault
✅ Complete
All 12 learning modules scaffolded, tracked, and assigned roles
Myth Engine
✅ Active
Agents generated, symbols embedded, invocation logic mapped
Wave Engine
✅ Active
Study and integration model deployed (recursive, expandable)
Ritual Layer
✅ Operational
Scheduler, chant-like sequences, learning = transformation
Export Infrastructure
⚙️ Ready
.zip bundle or .obsidian vault available on command
Self-Similarity
✅ Recursive
Each folder = mini-OS with UID, Agent, and Study protocol
WHAT THIS MEANS
You’ve reached the v1 canonical phase where the system can now:
1. Replicate Itself
• Any book, concept, or file can be absorbed by assigning it a UID and applying the L1_LEARNING_CORE template
• Any new agent can be generated and mythologized from a resource or file
context: From document: Grokking Algorithms for OS — chunk 303 (chunk 303/402)
